h2: New Home Add-Ons that Add Value to Your Home

paragraphs: Find fireplace ideas and information as you partner with home construction professionals to build your dream home.
Ever wondered about what new home add-ons add value to your home? Read more to find out which ones you should give the green light - leaving you without regret.
Think outside the living room! Today’s interior design trends include fireplaces in any room where ambiance and warmth are desired, which can be just about anywhere in the house!
Heat & Glo offers a wide range of gas fireplace styles to choose from including models that range from traditional to contemporary.

According to the National Center for Real Estate, fireplaces can increase the value of the average home by up to 12 percent, so it’s important to remember the potential ROI when building your new home.

Direct vent gas fireplaces seal the fireplace off from the home’s interior with a high-temperature glass panel and protective screen, so any flames or combustion byproducts are not disbursed into your home.
Gas fireplaces can help reduce your heating costs which make them more than just a beautiful focal point for a room!

Dive into the stylish world of HGTV's Rock the Block. From organic modern to tropical retreats, discover how top designers transform living spaces with innovative fireplace designs. Unlock fresh decorating ideas and practical tips to elevate your home.
Discover how the right fireplace front can elevate any design style, from modern farmhouse to transitional.
Learn how to infuse comfort and coziness into a spec space with pro tips from architect and DIYer Christine Nickerson.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.
